channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
item.description: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

item.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
item.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
item.description: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

item.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
item.description: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

item.title: Next week brings earnings and inflation data amid resumption of U.S.-Iran hostilities. Here's what's ahead
item.description: Investors are anticipating the start of earnings season and the release of June inflation data, just as the U.S-Iran war threatens to reassert itself.

item.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
item.description: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

item.title: Multiple New York Times reporters issued subpoenas over Air Force One reporting
item.description: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to several journalists after its report on security concerns involving the new Air Force One, according to the paper.

item.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
item.description: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

item.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
item.description: Congress passed the housing bill in June with strong bipartisan support amid concerns of rising home prices and institutional investors affecting the market.

item.title: OpenAI power consolidates under co-founder Greg Brockman ahead of prospective IPO
item.description: With Fidji Simo's official departure from OpenAI due to a chronic medical issue, Greg Brockman's role has become clearer.

item.title: These are America's 10 most expensive states for 2026, where inflation is punishing residents
item.description: These 10 U.S. states are the most expensive places to live in America in 2026, with inflation punishing residents to an extreme degree.

item.title: These are America's 10 cheapest states for 2026, where you can still beat inflation
item.description: These are America's cheapest states to live in for 2026, where residents can still beat inflation.

item.title: China evacuates more than one million people as Typhoon Bavi nears
item.description: The storm is expected to weaken as it moves towards China, but it remains a risk as its rain bands encompass an area about the size of France.

item.title: Seize the advantage in Micron options against the SK Hynix listing, Jeff Kilburg says
item.description: MU options saw massive activity Friday, indicating heavy hedging or directional bets as the memory chip trade repositions.

item.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
item.description: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

item.title: S&P 500 closes higher to notch a winning week, helped by tech gains
item.description: The S&P 500 rose on Friday, bolstered by a couple Big Tech names, to notch a weekly gain.

item.title: UAE defense firm EDGE Group wants to turn homegrown military tech into a global business
item.description: EDGE Group CEO Hamad Al Marar discusses the UAE’s push to build a globally competitive defense industry — and how technology, manufacturing and exports are shaping that ambition.

item.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
item.description: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

item.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%
item.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

item.title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
item.description: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.

item.title: How Apple stock rode the AI rollercoaster to record highs in 1 chart
item.description: Apple stayed true to itself in the AI race, and Wall Street is finally rewarding the stock for it.

item.title: Looking for your first credit card? The Chase Freedom Rise earns 3% cash back for a limited time
item.description: Building or rebuilding your credit? The Chase Freedom Rise offers a limited-time 3% cash-back bonus on dining, plus rewards and perks for new cardholders.

item.title: Senate Democrats want hearings on Trump’s crypto holdings and foreign investors
item.description: Democratic Senators cited $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income, unidentified investors and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial.

item.title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
item.description: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

item.title: The ETF market is pushing the limits of the leverage it can handle. SK Hynix is the latest example
item.description: The original ETF boom was about low cost, tax-efficient core index funds. Now single-stock ETFs are upping risk, with leverage getting 'a little carried away.'

item.title: As bank earnings approach, a market anomaly emerges
item.description: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at roughly 15.5 times forward earnings — about a turn and a quarter cheaper than where it stood in 2024.

item.title: Trump Accounts may help foster children build a financial safety net. What to know
item.description: Advocates say that Trump Accounts for foster children may end up being helpful, as long as concerns about flexibility and accessibility are addressed.

item.title: Air taxi company Beta wraps first test flights in U.S. government's pilot program
item.description: Beta is one of several electric air taxi makers racing to secure Federal Aviation Administration certification and start flying passengers commercially.

item.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Meta's stock has best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
item.description: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.
